raw_consumer_statement: In XX/XX/year>2026, I filed a dispute with my credit card for a {$2500.00} charge. Initially on XX/XX/scrub> 2026 the merchant was awarded the dispute. At that time, the {$2500.00} charge reappeared on my credit card. I filed a dispute and submitted more information. I was then given documentation that the dispute had been awarded in my favor. However, the dispute continually says the conditional credit that was applied to your account will remain. I have attempted to call multiple times stating that the conditional credit had been reversed on XX/XX/XXXX. Nobody is able to tell me when/if this charge will fall off and Im about have interest charges unless I pay it. I have multiple forms of documentation stating the dispute was awarded in my favor as well as proof the charge is still on my statement
